Package Index | Class Index

Class Index

A B C F H I L M N O P R S T U X

A

AndroidException Base class for all checked exceptions thrown by the Android frameworks. 
AndroidRuntimeException Base class for all unchecked exceptions thrown by the Android frameworks. 
ArrayMap<K, V> ArrayMap is a generic key->value mapping data structure that is designed to be more memory efficient than a traditional HashMap. 
ArraySet<E> ArraySet is a generic set data structure that is designed to be more memory efficient than a traditional HashSet. 
ArrayUtils Static utility methods for arrays that aren't already included in Arrays. 
ArtBinaryXmlPullParser

This decodes large code-points using 4-byte sequences, and is not compatible with the DataInput API contract, which specifies that large code-points must be encoded with 3-byte sequences. 
ArtBinaryXmlSerializer

This encodes large code-points using 4-byte sequences and is not compatible with the DataOutput API contract, which specifies that large code-points must be encoded with 3-byte sequences. 
AssetFileDescriptor File descriptor of an entry in the AssetManager. 
AssetFileDescriptor.AutoCloseInputStream An InputStream you can create on a ParcelFileDescriptor, which will take care of calling ParcelFileDescriptor.close() for you when the stream is closed. 
AssetFileDescriptor.AutoCloseOutputStream An OutputStream you can create on a ParcelFileDescriptor, which will take care of calling ParcelFileDescriptor.close() for you when the stream is closed. 
AssetFileDescriptor.NonSeekableAutoCloseInputStream An InputStream you can create on a non seekable file descriptor, like PIPE, SOCKET and FIFO, which will take care of calling ParcelFileDescriptor.close() for you when the stream is closed. 
AssetFileDescriptor.SeekableAutoCloseInputStream An InputStream you can create on a seekable file descriptor, which means you can use pread to read from a specific offset, this will take care of calling ParcelFileDescriptor.close() for you when the stream is closed. 
AssetManager A slimmed-down version of AssetManager used by minimal Android runtime to run bound services. 

B

BadParcelableException Exception thrown when a Parcelable is malformed or otherwise invalid. 
Base64 Utilities for encoding and decoding the Base64 representation of binary data. 
Base64.Coder  
Base64.Decoder  
Base64.Encoder  
BaseBundle A mapping from String keys to values of various types. 
BinaryXmlPullParser Parser that reads XML documents using a custom binary wire protocol which benchmarking has shown to be 8.5x faster than ERROR(/Xml.newFastPullParser()) for a typical packages.xml. 
BinaryXmlPullParser.Attribute Holder representing a single attribute. 
BinaryXmlSerializer Serializer that writes XML documents using a custom binary wire protocol which benchmarking has shown to be 4.3x faster and use 2.4x less disk space than Xml.newFastSerializer() for a typical packages.xml. 
Binder Base class for a remotable object, the core part of a lightweight remote procedure call mechanism defined by IBinder. 
Binder.NoImagePreloadHolder  
BinderCallHeavyHitterWatcher A watcher which makes stats on the incoming binder transaction, if the amount of some type of transactions exceeds the threshold, the listener will be notified. 
BinderCallHeavyHitterWatcher.BinderCallHeavyHitterListener Callback interface when the amount of some type of transactions exceeds the threshold. 
BinderCallHeavyHitterWatcher.HeavyHitterContainer Container to hold the potential heavy hitters 
BinderInternal Private and debugging Binder APIs. 
BinderInternal.BinderProxyCountEventListener Interface for callback invocation when the Binder Proxy limit is reached. 
BinderInternal.BinderProxyCountEventListenerDelegate  
BinderInternal.CallSession A session used by BinderInternal.Observer in order to keep track of some data. 
BinderInternal.CallStatsObserver Allows to track observe incoming binder call stats. 
BinderInternal.GcWatcher  
BinderInternal.Observer Allows to track various steps of an API call. 
BinderInternal.WorkSourceProvider Responsible for resolving a work source. 
Build  
Build.VERSION  
Build.VERSION_CODES  
Bundle A mapping from String keys to various Parcelable values. 

C

CancellationSignal Provides the ability to cancel an operation in progress. 
CancellationSignal.OnCancelListener Listens for cancellation. 
CancellationSignal.Transport  
ClassLoaderFactory Creates class loaders. 
CloseGuard CloseGuard is a mechanism for flagging implicit finalizer cleanup of resources that should have been cleaned up by explicit close methods (aka "explicit termination methods" in Effective Java). 
Config This class is deprecated. This class is not useful, it just returns the same value for all constants, and has always done this. Do not use it. 
Context A simplified version of Context for use in minimal Android runtime environments. 
ContextWrapper A simplified version of ContextWrapper for use in minimal Android runtime environments. 

F

FastDataInput Optimized implementation of DataInput which buffers data in memory from the underlying InputStream. 
FastDataOutput Optimized implementation of DataOutput which buffers data in memory before flushing to the underlying OutputStream. 
FastPrintWriter  
FastPrintWriter.DummyWriter  
FastXmlSerializer This is a quick and dirty implementation of XmlSerializer that isn't horribly painfully slow like the normal one. 
FileUtils Utility methods useful for working with files. 
FileUtils.NoImagePreloadHolder Regular expression for safe filenames: no spaces or metacharacters. 
FileUtils.ProgressListener Listener that is called periodically as progress is made. 
FunctionalUtils Utilities specific to functional programming 
FunctionalUtils.RemoteExceptionIgnoringConsumer<T> A Consumer that automatically ignores any RemoteExceptions. 
FunctionalUtils.ThrowingBiConsumer<A, B> A BiConsumer that allows throwing checked exceptions from its single abstract method. 
FunctionalUtils.ThrowingBiFunction<T, U, R> A BiFunction that allows throwing checked exceptions from its single abstract method. 
FunctionalUtils.ThrowingChecked2Consumer<Input, ExceptionOne extends Exception, ExceptionTwo extends Exception> A Consumer that allows the caller to specify 2 different custom checked Exceptions that can be thrown by the implementer. 
FunctionalUtils.ThrowingCheckedConsumer<Input, ExceptionType extends Exception> A Consumer that allows the caller to specify a custom checked Exception that can be thrown by the implementer. 
FunctionalUtils.ThrowingCheckedFunction<Input, Output, ExceptionType extends Exception> A Function that allows the caller to specify a custom checked Exception that can be thrown by the implementer. 
FunctionalUtils.ThrowingCheckedSupplier<Output, ExceptionType extends Exception> A Supplier that allows the caller to specify a custom checked Exception that can be thrown by the implementer. 
FunctionalUtils.ThrowingConsumer<T> A Consumer that allows throwing checked exceptions from its single abstract method. 
FunctionalUtils.ThrowingFunction<T, R> A Function that allows throwing checked exceptions from its single abstract method. 
FunctionalUtils.ThrowingRunnable An equivalent of Runnable that allows throwing checked exceptions This can be used to specify a lambda argument without forcing all the checked exceptions to be handled within it 
FunctionalUtils.ThrowingSupplier<T> An equivalent of Supplier that allows throwing checked exceptions This can be used to specify a lambda argument without forcing all the checked exceptions to be handled within it 

H

Handler A Handler allows you to send and process Message and Runnable objects associated with a thread's MessageQueue. 
Handler.BlockingRunnable  
Handler.Callback Callback interface you can use when instantiating a Handler to avoid having to implement your own subclass of Handler. 
Handler.MessengerImpl  

I

IBinder Base interface for a remotable object, the core part of a lightweight remote procedure call mechanism designed for high performance when performing in-process and cross-process calls. 
IBinder.DeathRecipient Interface for receiving a callback when the process hosting an IBinder has gone away. 
IBinder.FrozenStateChangeCallback A callback interface for receiving frozen state change events. 
IInterface Base class for Binder interfaces. 
IndentingPrintWriter This class is deprecated. Use IndentingPrintWriter 
Intent A simplified version of Intent for use in minimal Android runtime environments. 

L

Log A simplified version of Log for use in minimal Android runtime environments. 
Log.Level Log priority levels annotation. 
Looper Class used to run a message loop for a thread. 
LruCache<K, V> A cache that holds strong references to a limited number of values. 

M

MemoryFile MemoryFile is a wrapper for ERROR(/SharedMemory) which can optionally be set to purgeable. 
MemoryFile.MemoryInputStream  
MemoryFile.MemoryOutputStream  
Message Defines a message containing a description and arbitrary data object that can be sent to a Handler. 
MessageQueue Low-level class holding the list of messages to be dispatched by a Looper. 
MessageQueue.FileDescriptorRecord  
MessageQueue.IdleHandler Callback interface for discovering when a thread is going to block waiting for more messages. 
MessageQueue.OnFileDescriptorEventListener A listener which is invoked when file descriptor related events occur. 
Messenger Reference to a Handler, which others can use to send messages to it. 
MimeTypeMap Two-way map that maps MIME-types to file extensions and vice versa. 

N

NetworkOnMainThreadException The exception that is thrown when an application attempts to perform a networking operation on its main thread. 

O

OperationApplicationException Thrown when an application of a ERROR(/ContentProviderOperation) fails due the specified constraints. 
OperationCanceledException An exception type that is thrown when an operation in progress is canceled. 

P

Pair<F, S> Container to ease passing around a tuple of two objects. 
Parcel Container for a message (data and object references) that can be sent through an IBinder. 
Parcel.LazyValue  
Parcelable Interface for classes whose instances can be written to and restored from a Parcel. 
Parcelable.ClassLoaderCreator<T> Specialization of Parcelable.Creator that allows you to receive the ClassLoader the object is being created in. 
Parcelable.Creator<T> Interface that must be implemented and provided as a public CREATOR field that generates instances of your Parcelable class from a Parcel. 
ParcelFileDescriptor The FileDescriptor returned by Parcel.readFileDescriptor(), allowing you to close it when done with it. 
ParcelFileDescriptor.AutoCloseInputStream An InputStream you can create on a ParcelFileDescriptor, which will take care of calling ParcelFileDescriptor.close() for you when the stream is closed. 
ParcelFileDescriptor.AutoCloseOutputStream An OutputStream you can create on a ParcelFileDescriptor, which will take care of calling ParcelFileDescriptor.close() for you when the stream is closed. 
ParcelFileDescriptor.FileDescriptorDetachedException Exception that indicates that the file descriptor was detached. 
ParcelFileDescriptor.OnCloseListener Callback indicating that a ParcelFileDescriptor has been closed. 
ParcelFileDescriptor.Status Internal class representing a remote status read by ERROR(/ParcelFileDescriptor#readCommStatus(FileDescriptor, byte[])). 
PersistableBundle A mapping from String keys to values of various types. 
Preconditions Simple static methods to be called at the start of your own methods to verify correct arguments and state. 
Printer Simple interface for printing text, allowing redirection to various targets. 
ProtoOutputStream Class to write to a protobuf stream. 

R

RavenwoodEnvironment Class to interact with the Ravenwood environment. 
RavenwoodEnvironment.Workaround A set of APIs used to work around missing features on Ravenwood. 
RemoteException Parent exception for all Binder remote-invocation errors Note: not all exceptions from binder services will be subclasses of this. 
ResultReceiver Generic interface for receiving a callback result from someone. 
ResultReceiver.MyResultReceiver  
ResultReceiver.MyRunnable  

S

Service A slimmed-down version of Service for use in minimal Android runtime environments. 
ShellCallback  
Size Immutable class for describing width and height dimensions in pixels. 
SizedInputStream Reads exact number of bytes from wrapped stream, returning EOF once those bytes have been read. 
SizeF Immutable class for describing width and height dimensions in some arbitrary unit. 
Spanned This is the interface for text that has markup objects attached to ranges of it. 
SparseArray<E> SparseArray maps integers to Objects and, unlike a normal array of Objects, its indices can contain gaps. 
SparseBooleanArray SparseBooleanArrays map integers to booleans. 
SparseIntArray SparseIntArrays map integers to integers. 

T

TextUtils  
TextUtils.Reverser  
TextUtils.SimpleStringSplitter A simple string splitter. 
TextUtils.StringSplitter An interface for splitting strings according to rules that are opaque to the user of this interface. 
TextUtils.StringWithRemovedChars A special string manipulation class. 
TextUtils.TruncateAt  
TimeUtils A class containing utility methods related to time zones. 
TypedXmlPullParser Specialization of XmlPullParser which adds explicit methods to support consistent and efficient conversion of primitive data types. 
TypedXmlSerializer Specialization of XmlSerializer which adds explicit methods to support consistent and efficient conversion of primitive data types. 

U

UserHandle Representation of a user on the device. 

X

Xml XML utility methods. 
Xml.Encoding Supported character encodings. 
XmlPullParserWrapper Wrapper which delegates all calls through to the given XmlPullParser. 
XmlSerializerWrapper Wrapper which delegates all calls through to the given XmlSerializer.
